verse.name: V1
verse.lines: All heaven declares The glory of the risen Lord Who can compare with The beauty of the Lord

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Forever He will be The Lamb upon the throne I gladly bow the knee And worship Him alone

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I will proclaim The glory of the risen Lord Who once was slain To reconcile man to God

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Forever You will be The Lamb upon the throne I gladly bow the knee And worship You alone
